title: Define readiness gate for OpenSearch decommission
description:
Define explicit pass/fail criteria to authorize OpenSearch removal.

Include:
- Required validation duration and run frequency
- Minimum successful run threshold across representative scorecards
- Error budget / incident threshold
- Required evidence links to reports and CI

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: 2026-03-06 09:19 ET: Readiness gate (fast path) defined: approve decommission once (1) OpenSearch is unused in feature path (no code/config references), (2) at least one completed 60-day S3 vectors report run exists as evidence (use latest completed report), and (3) rollback note in epic remains valid. Current status: OpenSearch references removed from code/config; awaiting completed 60-day S3 report evidence to finalize gate.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: 2026-03-06 09:28 ET: Readiness gate satisfied (fast path). OpenSearch is now unused in feature path (no code/config references); evidence report: AW 60-day S3 vectors run completed (task bbbe683a-2045-42ca-adc7-4884d6420872, report 0503f133-efdf-4f7b-a8a7-fba71621b137, output status=ok). Rollback note in epic remains valid.
